views.name: TodayView
views.purpose: Daily medication timeline grouped by time slots (Morning, Afternoon, Evening, Bedtime). Top section shows progress ring with X/Y doses taken and current streak badge. Each dose card displays color dot, medication name, dosage, form icon, and scheduled time. Tap a card to mark as taken (stamps actual time) or long-press for skip. Overdue unmarked doses auto-mark as missed at midnight. Due-now cards pulse with yellow accent border.

views.name: MedicationsView
views.purpose: Catalog of all configured medications split into Active and Inactive sections. Each row shows color dot, name, dosage, form icon, frequency badge, and supply gauge. Low supply (under 7 days) shows red warning. Nav bar plus button opens MedicationEntrySheet. Tap row to edit. Swipe left to deactivate or delete.

views.name: AdherenceView
views.purpose: Three-section analytics: (1) Streak display with current and best streak. (2) Calendar heatmap for past 30 days — green for 100%, yellow for partial, red for missed days, gray for no data. Tap day for breakdown. (3) Per-medication adherence bars ranked lowest to highest, highlighting problem medications. Weekly trend comparison at bottom.

views.name: MedicationEntrySheet
views.purpose: Modal form to add or edit a medication. Name and dosage text fields with suggestion chips (5mg, 10mg, 25mg, 50mg, 100mg, 500mg). Visual form picker with icons. Frequency picker that dynamically shows multiple time pickers for multi-dose frequencies. Color dot selector as horizontal scroll of tappable circles. Optional instructions field. Supply stepper with quick-add buttons (+30, +60, +90). Active toggle defaults to true. Validates name and dosage are non-empty before save.

viewModelComputedProperties.name: todaySchedule
viewModelComputedProperties.description: All doses for today derived from active medications and their frequencies, sorted by scheduled time. Each ScheduledDose has medication reference, time, and DoseStatus.

viewModelComputedProperties.name: todayProgress
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Doses taken vs total scheduled today, driving the progress ring.

viewModelComputedProperties.name: currentStreak
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Consecutive days with 100% adherence ending today or yesterday. Resets on any day with missed doses.

viewModelComputedProperties.name: bestStreak
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Longest perfect adherence streak ever recorded.

viewModelComputedProperties.name: overallAdherenceRate
viewModelComputedProperties.description: All-time taken doses / total scheduled doses (0.0-1.0), excluding as-needed.

viewModelComputedProperties.name: weeklyAdherence
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Last 7 days of daily adherence rates for the trend chart.

viewModelComputedProperties.name: perMedicationAdherence
viewModelComputedProperties.description: 30-day adherence per active medication, sorted ascending by rate.

viewModelComputedProperties.name: lowSupplyMedications
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Active medications where remaining supply covers fewer than 7 days of doses.

viewModelComputedProperties.name: activeMedications
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Entries where isActive is true, sorted by name.

viewModelComputedProperties.name: dosesDueNow
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Doses within 30 minutes of scheduled time not yet acted on.

viewModelComputedProperties.name: monthlyHeatmapData
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Last 30 days of daily adherence for the calendar heatmap.

dailyGoal.description: Take all scheduled medications at their designated times with 100% daily adherence.

domainLogic.streakDefinition: All scheduled doses (excluding as-needed) marked taken by midnight. Skipped or missed doses break the streak.
domainLogic.trendAnalysis: Weekly adherence rate vs previous week. Per-medication 30-day rolling compliance. Time-of-day miss patterns (morning vs evening). Supply burn-rate projecting refill dates.
insights: Most consistent medication by highest adherence rate
Most missed medication by lowest adherence rate
Weakest time slot analysis (e.g. evening doses missed 3x more)
Refill prediction based on supply burn rate
Perfect day recognition when all doses taken on time
